overall.description: A cinematic drive through an abandoned industrial wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 style), featuring massive concrete cooling towers, futuristic street infrastructure, and derelict vehicles scattered along the roadside under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial access road with warehouse complex

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the deserted industrial road toward the distant cooling towers

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial facility with metal walkways and dark facade
massive concrete hyperboloid cooling towers emitting steam
tall poles with horizontal orange glowing elements lining the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide abandoned industrial road flanked by dry vegetation. A large industrial warehouse dominates the left side while massive cooling towers loom in the distance on the right. The camera moves steadily forward past futuristic street lights under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with derelict vehicles approaching power plant

events.description: passing abandoned green sedan parked on the right roadside
passing abandoned red convertible with open doors on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past derelict vehicles toward the industrial complex, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: derelict green four-door car with open doors and missing wheels
rusted red convertible sports car with interior exposed
raised industrial walkway with large pipes running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The camera advances along the industrial road, passing two abandoned vehicles—a green sedan and a red convertible—parked on the right shoulder. The cooling towers grow larger and more detailed, while elevated industrial pipelines become visible on the right. The warehouse recedes behind as the road continues toward the power plant complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching massive cooling towers and smokestack complex

events.description: passing abandoned silver sports car on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving toward the base of the massive cooling towers, approaching the heart of the industrial complex

entered.detail: derelict silver low-profile sports car with gull-wing doors open
tall red and white striped industrial chimney rising behind the cooling towers
additional massive cooling tower now visible on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the base of the massive cooling towers, now flanking both sides of the road. A tall red-and-white striped smokestack dominates the center horizon. The camera passes a final abandoned silver sports car as it drives deeper into the industrial complex, with the massive concrete structures towering overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate industrial road that transitions from an open wasteland into the heart of a massive power plant complex. It begins by gliding past a large warehouse and futuristic street lights, with towering cooling towers appearing as distant silhouettes against a clear blue sky. As the camera advances, the warehouse recedes and the cooling towers grow in scale, passing a green sedan and a red convertible abandoned on the roadside while elevated pipelines emerge on the right. The scene then shifts as the road leads directly into the industrial core, where the concrete structures begin to flank both sides of the path. Finally, the camera passes a silver sports car and drives toward a dominant red-and-white striped smokestack, with the colossal cooling towers now looming overhead.
